title: mesosphaerum fruticosum
intro: Mesosphaerum fruticosum, also known as False Verbena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to Brazil and other parts of South America, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in essential oils, particularly citral, which has been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Mesosphaerum fruticosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
